label: Klik (Klik_one frontend · KMP/Kotlin)
behavior: K1: clickable surfaces use Modifier.k1Clickable (kills the gray ripple)
⚠ Material3 reference (forbidden in ui/klikone — k1-guards blocks it)
encodeDefaults=false — required wire fields must be non-default (the 403 landmine)
fixed-size Canvas glyphs (K1 waveform/sparkle must be width+height sized)
⚠ raw Modifier.clickable (should be k1Clickable in ui/klikone)
boundaries_global: Android mirror: Klik_newandroid (sibling fork — every invariant enforced twice or it drifts)
iOS native: iosMain bridges (Keychain, AVFoundation, Apple Sign-In)

data: backend API (Environment-configured): 8004 main · 8833 auth · 8333 askklik · 8341 notif · 8002 streaming
platform: iosMain / androidMain actual implementations; SHA-256 SPKI pinning on iOS
